design_name: Rectangular-to-round duct transition adapter with bottom rectangular flange, smooth lofted midsection, and top cylindrical neck, centered at XY origin, standing upright along Z axis.
prompt: A rectangular-to-round duct transition adapter, standing upright along the Z axis, centered at the origin in XY. The part has three sections from bottom to top: (1) a rectangular mounting flange 70mm (X) by 50mm (Y), 3mm thick, from Z=0 to Z=3; (2) a smooth lofted transition from a 60mm x 40mm rectangle at Z=3 to a circle of 30mm diameter at Z=53; (3) a cylindrical neck 30mm in diameter extending from Z=53 to Z=63. All sections are centered at the origin in XY.
primitive_plan_summary: Rectangular-to-round duct transition adapter with bottom rectangular flange, smooth lofted midsection, and top cylindrical neck, centered at XY origin, standing upright along Z axis.

verifier_score.feedback: All constraints met. The bounding box is 70x50x63mm, matching the flange dimensions in XY and total height from Z=0 to Z=63. The rendered views confirm: (1) a rectangular mounting flange at the base, (2) a smooth lofted transition from rectangle to circle, and (3) a cylindrical neck at the top. The part is centered at the origin in XY (center of mass x≈0, y≈0). The geometry is valid, watertight, with no self-intersections. The volume of ~91,482 mm³ is physically plausible for a solid adapter of these dimensions. All three sections are clearly visible and correctly proportioned in the rendered views.

final_verifier_score.feedback: All constraints met. The bounding box is 70x50x63mm, matching the flange dimensions in XY and total height from Z=0 to Z=63. The rendered views confirm: (1) a rectangular mounting flange at the base, (2) a smooth lofted transition from rectangle to circle, and (3) a cylindrical neck at the top. The part is centered at the origin in XY (center of mass x≈0, y≈0). The geometry is valid, watertight, with no self-intersections. The volume of ~91,482 mm³ is physically plausible for a solid adapter of these dimensions. All three sections are clearly visible and correctly proportioned in the rendered views.
